image_0f86cfcc41b4fb.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"\\log I_1-\\log I_2=0.9\\Rightarrow \\log\\frac{I_1}{I_2}=0.9","note":"對數差轉為商的對數"}

image_10ccaf4170dcdf.png.note: 對數與平方根的代數式

image_48d6e8acdd9d77.png.note: 指數與常用對數近似式

image_4fbd52957e4378.png.note: 對等式兩邊取以2為底的對數
image_4fbd52957e4378.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"2^{\\frac{n}{8}}=12\\Rightarrow \\log_{2}2^{\\frac{n}{8}}=\\log_{2}12","note":"對等式兩邊取以2為底的對數"}

image_6239e9595cd5eb.png.note: 指數為分數 n/m 的等式
image_6239e9595cd5eb.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"3=2^{\\frac{n}{m}}","note":"指數為分數 n/m 的等式"}

image_63c13ad63f3c45.png.note: 等比級數求和公式化簡

image_6ac5340c52cbdc.png.note: 單一斜體大寫字母 I

image_7f6c193e2f9438.png.note: 對數與期望值比的計算式

image_81d4fdb7897fef.png.note: 對數式：以2為底的3的對數

image_8a50067831d12d.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"\\log_5\\left(\\log_{\\frac{1}{5}}\\left(\\log_5 z\\right)\\right)=0\\Rightarrow \\log_{\\frac{1}{5}}\\left(\\log_5 z\\right)=5^0=1\\Rightarrow \\log_5 z=\\left(\\frac{1}{5}\\right)^1=\\frac{1}{5}\\Rightarrow z=5^{\\frac{1}{5}}","note":"對數方程推導"}

image_c57c77ed038068.png.note: 對數式轉指數式並化為同底數
image_c57c77ed038068.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"\\log_{8}4=x\\Rightarrow 8^{x}=4\\Rightarrow 2^{3x}=2^{2}","note":"對數式轉指數式並化為同底數"}

image_eae2e58d63fa7b.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"\\log_3\\left(\\log_{\\frac{1}{3}}\\left(\\log_3 y\\right)\\right)=0\\Rightarrow \\log_{\\frac{1}{3}}\\left(\\log_3 y\\right)=3^0=1\\Rightarrow \\log_3 y=\\left(\\frac{1}{3}\\right)^1=\\frac{1}{3}\\Rightarrow y=3^{\\frac{1}{3}}","note":"對數方程式求解步驟"}

image_fb9a1ed871ef57.png.note: 對數式轉指數式並化為同底數
image_fb9a1ed871ef57.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"\\log_{4}\\sqrt{2}=x\\Rightarrow 4^{x}=\\sqrt{2}\\Rightarrow 2^{2x}=2^{\\frac{1}{2}}","note":"對數式轉指數式並化為同底數"}
